tasks.title: Resilience & Edge Case Design Document
tasks.notes: docs/stall-detector-resilience.md created with 6 edge case decisions: log-not-created, read-failure, process-exit, spawn-gap, concurrent-add, stale-preexisting. Includes consistency checks and implementation guidelines.

tasks.title: VERIFY: Phase 0 — Resilience Analysis
tasks.notes: ✅ All 6 edge cases documented with explicit decisions. ✅ Consistency checks: 5 invariants + 4 cross-case scenarios verify no contradictions. ✅ Implementation guidelines included. ✅ Document committed. Verification passed.

tasks.title: Add lastLlmActivityAt to Agent Type (src/types.ts)
tasks.notes: lastLlmActivityAt?: string (ISO 8601) added to Agent interface. Compiled successfully. Commit: ac16482

tasks.title: Log File Path Resolver (Claude + Gemini)
tasks.notes: resolveSessionLogPath() created with Claude/Gemini path handling. Unit tests with mocked paths pass. Commit: a1d5faa

tasks.title: StallEntry Type & StallDetector Class Skeleton
tasks.notes: StallEntry interface + StallDetector class skeleton with add/update/remove/getEntry/start/stop. Singleton via getStallDetector(). Barrel export created. Commit: bd8d20a

tasks.title: Internal execute_command Wrapper (readLogTail)
tasks.notes: readLogTail() in read-log-tail.ts uses getStrategy(agent).execCommand (5s timeout). Handles Windows/POSIX, missing file (null not error), throws (error returned). logLine before each read. Unit tests pass. Commit: 53da2dd

tasks.title: Polling Loop Implementation (_poll method)
tasks.notes: _poll() iterates stallCheckList: provisional entries checked via baseline timeout only; full entries read log via readLogTail; stall_detected logged after STALL_THRESHOLD_MS; updateAgent called on activity advance; read failures increment counter without triggering stall; missing files skipped silently. Env: STALL_POLL_INTERVAL_MS/STALL_THRESHOLD_MS. Unit tests with fake timers. Commit: c187004

tasks.title: Unit Tests for StallDetector
tasks.notes: 33 tests across stall-detector.test.ts (18), read-log-tail.test.ts (9), log-path-resolver.test.ts (6). Fixed vi.hoisted() for mock hoisting. All pass. Commit: e86481d

tasks.title: VERIFY: Phase 1 — Foundation
tasks.notes: ✅ npm run build — clean, no TypeScript errors, no `any` types in stall/ code. ✅ npm test — 68 files, 1104 passed, 7 skipped, 0 failed. ✅ Single setInterval (line 53 stall-detector.ts). ✅ No fs.stat/readFile in stall/ — all reads via readLogTail→execCommand. ✅ log-path-resolver tests pass for claude + gemini. ✅ readLogTail tests pass (9 cases). ✅ StallDetector tests pass (18 cases including fake-timer stall detection).

tasks.title: Hook StallDetector into execute_prompt — Two-Phase Add & All Exit Paths
tasks.notes: Two-phase add in execute-prompt.ts: Phase A provisional add after inFlightAgents.add, Phase B upgrade on parsed.sessionId via stallDetector.update. stallDetector.remove in finally block covers all 5 exit paths. Build clean, 68 test files / 1104 passed / 7 skipped.

tasks.title: Hook StallDetector into stop_prompt
tasks.notes: stallDetector.remove(agent.id) called in stop-prompt.ts after tryKillPid. Idempotent, safe for double-remove.

tasks.title: Hook StallDetector into Member Unregister
tasks.notes: stallDetector.remove(agent.id) called in remove-member.ts after removeFromRegistry. Idempotent.

tasks.title: Initialize StallDetector on Server Start/Stop + log MCP caller identity
tasks.notes: stallDetector.start() after server.connect in src/index.ts. stallDetector.stop() in SIGINT/SIGTERM handlers. Startup log includes client name/version, pid, ppid. MCP clientInfo captured during initialize handshake.

tasks.title: VERIFY: Phase 2 — Integration
tasks.notes: ✅ npm run build — clean. ✅ npm test — 1104 passed / 7 skipped / 0 failed. ✅ T7: Two-phase add + provisional tracking ✅ T8: stop_prompt removes immediately ✅ T9: remove_member removes from stallCheckList ✅ T10: StallDetector lifecycle hooks + MCP clientInfo in startup log. All exit paths covered. Idempotent remove() prevents double-deletion errors.

tasks.title: Surface lastLlmActivityAt in member_detail
tasks.notes: lastLlmActivityAt added to session object. idleSecs computed at read time only when status='busy' and lastLlmActivityAt non-null. Build clean. Commit: c1005da

tasks.title: Surface lastLlmActivityAt in fleet_status
tasks.notes: lastLlmActivityAt added to AgentStatusRow interface and populated from agent record in checkAgent(). Appears in JSON output per member. Build clean. Commit: a8b6df6
